description: The Generic UI Container is a component that is seen on UIX panels and canvases. It does two primary things, match the title for the panel of a provided text, and flag when it closes and then destroys the provided hierarchy root slot.

fields.Title: Changes the title for this panel.
fields.CloseRequest: Becomes true when this container (UIX panel/canvas) is closing.

usage: There is no known usage for this component to be used in projects, but only seen on certain panels and canvases.
